findings.description: markdownlint MD001 (heading-increment) violations: 17 instances of `####` headings under `##` sections in docs/policy-guide.md

decision: Changed all 17 `####` headings to `###` in docs/policy-guide.md (lines 15, 69, 94, 135, 137, 141, 170, 177, 292, 296, 319, 346, 377, 404, plus additional headings found). Pre-commit hooks auto-applied formatting fixes via prettier and end-of-file-fixer. All 15/15 pre-commit checks now pass.
